node._create_table_statement: CREATE TABLE `cron_leader` ( `lock_name` varchar(32) NOT NULL, `host` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL, `heartbeat` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`lock_name`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci
node.title: cron_leader
